description_long: This is a large, modern residential house complex surrounded by a perimeter wall and featuring multiple distinct outdoor amenities. The main building is composed of clean, white geometric volumes with flat roofs, large windows, and several terraces. The property includes a driveway with a carport, a swimming pool with a deck, a tennis court, and landscaped areas with trees and shrubs. There is also a greenhouse structure and a separate outbuilding, possibly a pool house or guest suite, near the tennis court. The overall layout is L-shaped, maximizing the use of outdoor space and providing privacy for recreational areas. The design emphasizes open, interconnected spaces and a strong indoor-outdoor relationship.
description: A sprawling modern house complex with flat roofs, large windows, a pool, tennis court, and landscaped grounds, enclosed by a perimeter wall. The design features geometric white volumes and multiple outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main entrance with the driveway, carport, and the front facade of the house, as well as part of the tennis court and landscaped areas.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the tennis court, greenhouse, and outbuilding, with a clear view of the pool and the rear of the main house.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a side perspective, focusing on the tennis court, pool area, and the linear arrangement of trees along the property boundary.
description_view_3: View 3 emphasizes the landscaped garden, the rear and side facades of the house, and the relationship between the main building and the outdoor amenities.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalist door integrated into the geometric facade, with no porch or columns.
